  1. logic.interfaces

Uses of Package
logic.interfaces

Packages that use logic.interfaces
Package
Description
logic.entity
 
logic.entity.characterClass
 
logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
 
logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters
 
logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters
 
  • Classes in logic.interfaces used by logic.entity
    Class
    Description
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
  • Classes in logic.interfaces used by logic.entity.characterClass
    Class
    Description
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    HaveWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that use a visible weapon sprite during attacks.
    UsesAmmo
    Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.
  • Classes in logic.interfaces used by logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
    Class
    Description
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    HaveWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that use a visible weapon sprite during attacks.
    OwnWeaponPos
    Marker interface for characters that override default weapon positioning logic.
    SpawnAttack
    Helper contract for classes that spawn projectile attacks into the active battle scene.
    UsesAmmo
    Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.
  • Classes in logic.interfaces used by logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters
    Class
    Description
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    HaveWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that use a visible weapon sprite during attacks.
  • Classes in logic.interfaces used by logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters
    Class
    Description
    Attackable
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    AttackAnimation
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    Damageable
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    HandleOwnWeapon
    Marker interface for characters that manage weapon rendering/behavior manually.
    SpawnAttack
    Helper contract for classes that spawn projectile attacks into the active battle scene.
    UsesAmmo
    Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.
